description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was traveling eastbound on Alameda Street between Bryant Street and Potrero 
Avenue in San Francisco when it encountered a stopped U-Haul truck with a cargo trailer (Vehicle 2) blocking eastbound Alameda Street. 
The Zoox vehicle operator slowed down to pass Vehicle 2 on the left. At that time, a person securing cargo on Vehicle 2, positioned on its 
right side, threw a tie-down strap over the cargo, which contacted the hood and radar housing of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle 
sustained minor damage. There were no reported injuries, and police were not notified.
Print
Clear Form
